title: Cobblemon: Extra Paradox Mons
description: Extra Paradox Mons offers new paradox pokemon that'll roam your minecraft worlds!
body:
This Datapack adds new paradox fakemon.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Current Paradox Fakemon:

1. Toxic Melody - Swamp Tag Biomes - Jungle
2. Iron Victory - Magical Tag Biomes - Desert - End
3. Iron Core - Bamboo Tag Biomes - End
4. Crimson Maw - Tundra Tag Biomes - Deep Dark
5. Iron Drone - Deep Ocean Tag Biomes - Fishing - End
6. Lumin Tail - Warm Ocean Tag Biomes - Fishing (in warm ocean)
7. Iron Virus - Mountain Tag Biomes - End
8. Iron Justice - Beach Tag Biomes - End
9. Feral Wish - Deep Dark Tag Biomes - Tundra
10. Wild Gene - Jungle Tag Biomes - Savanna
11. Iron Drill - Cave Tag Biomes - Deep Dark - End (to change the form, /pokeedit (party slot) mega_evolution=mega )
12. Iron Warp - Desert Tag Biomes - Deep Dark - End (to change the form, /pokeedit (party slot) perfection_state=perfected )
13. Gloom Shade - Deep Dark
14. Iron Gene - Magical Tag Biomes - End
15. Shiver Shrub - Tundra Tag Biomes
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
13. Saber Jaw - Jungle Tag Biomes - Savanna
14. Primal Shell - Swamp Tag Biomes - Jungle
15. Ancient Gale - Forest Tag Biomes
16. Tempest Fang - Desert Tag Biomes - Savanna
17. Iron Beak - Jungle Tag Biomes - Savanna - End
18. Iron Cocoon - Tundra Tag Biomes - Cherry Bolossom
19. Iron Bell - Floral Tag Biomes - Jungle - End
20. Iron Sail - Beach Tag Biomes - Fishing - End
21. Lunar Veil - Deep Ocean Tags Biomes - Fishing
22. Iron Flare - Mountain Tag Biomes - Tundra Tag Biomes - End (to change the form, /pokeedit (party slot) mega_evolution=mega )
23. Iron Flux - Mountain Tag Biomes - Tundra Tag Biomes - End (to change the form, /pokeedit (party slot) mega_evolution=mega )
24. Iron Genesis - Magical Tag Biomes - End (to change the form, /pokeedit (party slot) mega_evolution=mega )
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
How to install:
---------------
Copy the zip from your mod folder and paste it into your resourcepack folder. Once that is done you will want to make a world and paste it into the world's datapack folder aswell. The zip works as a resource and datapack so there should be no issues with the pack.
-
If there are any issues make sure to double check you have followed the installation tutorial and if problems persist please join the discord and ask for help in the help channel.
-

-
Server use is ok. Please do not put the models behind paywalls
- 
Server usage rules
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

custom skins are alright just make sure they follow the minercaft rules, as well as not putting the skin behind a pay of real currency

Examples of ways NOT to use the Paradox pokemon from Extra Paradox Mons

-paid zone access (real currency or currency purchased with real currency)

-crates p2w and f2p crates included (skins/pokemon directy in the crate and items from crates that cause the skin/pokemon )

-real currency shops

If there are any other ways that may include usage of real currency that i should put here, please let me know in the discord suggestions tab.
